hero.subtitle: Custom digital solutions — from design to architecture — built with full control over performance and experience.

about.intro: Full Stack Developer and Web Designer driven by the idea that technology should solve real problems — combining solid fundamentals, well-thought architecture, and a great experience for whoever uses it.
about.card_ares_text: Elizeu Sanches Junior — but you can call me Ares. A full stack developer passionate about technology since childhood. Born in Guarulhos (SP) and now living between Bahia and Pernambuco, Brazil. What drives me is the chance to imagine and make it real: I'm fascinated by precise, logical code, but also by the creative side of turning the invisible into something tangible.
about.card_bio_text: Raised by a strong, hard-working mother, I had my first contact with technology as a kid — and never stopped. Technical training in administration, my first VBA scripts in 2019, Python in 2023 (my mother tongue), and in 2025 the definitive leap into web development, starting with Flask. Today I keep going deeper into web technologies, combining logic and creativity.
about.card_objetivos_text: Build a solid track record in the market and, from there, create a complete vocational education platform — accessible, practical, and well-guided tech education. I want my work to become synonymous with creativity and strategy in software development.

projects.title: Selected projects
projects.subtitle: Every project starts from a real problem — here are a few examples of how I think about solutions, not just code.
projects.p1_desc: Management dashboard built with modular architecture, focused on data organization and real-time performance.
projects.p2_desc: Lead-generation page with entrance animations and a structure built for conversion without visual clutter.
projects.p3_desc: Python script that automatically organizes and generates spreadsheets from raw data, removing repetitive manual work.

skills.title: What I work with
skills.subtitle: I'd rather understand the fundamentals before relying on frameworks — I use tools only when they truly add value to the project.
skills.philosophy_text: Most of my solutions are built with native HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — not as a trend, but because it gives me full control over performance, behavior, and customization. Frameworks like React, Django, or Flask come in when they truly make sense for the project: to speed up delivery, structure a robust back-end, or scale something meant to grow. The tool serves the solution — never the other way around.

services.title: Custom solutions
services.subtitle: Every project is evaluated individually. What ties them all together is a commitment to performance, clarity, and a result that actually solves the problem.
services.s1_desc: Fast, well-structured pages built to convert — without relying on bloated plugins or generic builders.
services.s2_desc: Scripts and apps that remove repetitive manual work: spreadsheets, reports, data organization and processing.
services.s3_desc: Admin systems, REST APIs, and service integrations, with architecture designed to grow with the business.
services.cta_text: Tell me about it — no strings attached.

contact.title: Tell me about your project
contact.subtitle: I reply personally. Tell me what you need and we'll figure out the best path together.
